mainDressCode.title: Dress Code
mainDressCode.description: PRINCIPAL SPONSORS AND GUESTS ARE REQUESTED TO FOLLOW THE SAME FORMAL OR SEMI-FORMAL ATTIRE COLOR MOTIF: ASH GRAY, SLATE GRAY, AND DUSTY BLUE.

sections.title: Principal Sponsor & Guest
sections.description: Principal sponsors and guests are kindly requested to wear the same formal or semi-formal attire within the approved color motif: Ash Gray, Slate Gray, and Dusty Blue.
